headline: Jarrod Bowen
body: Jarrod Bowen confirms he's staying at West Ham following a meeting with Daniel Křetínský in Prague. As reported on talkSPORT, Bowen took time post-relegation to consider his future, prioritising talks with West Ham to understand their vision. Bowen has made an amendment to his contract, covering 2026/2027, as RoshaneSport called. His West Ham deal still runs until 2030.⚒️ 🗣️ Bowen: The main motivation for me is staying and bringing this club back into the Premier League where we belong.
raw_text:
Jarrod Bowen confirms he's staying at West Ham following a meeting with Daniel Křetínský in Prague.

As reported on @talkSPORT, Bowen took time post-relegation to consider his future, prioritising talks with West Ham to understand their vision.

Bowen has made an amendment to his contract, covering 2026/2027, as @RoshaneSport called. His West Ham deal still runs until 2030.⚒️

🗣️ Bowen: "The main motivation for me is staying and bringing this club back into the Premier League where we belong."
text:
Jarrod Bowen confirms he's staying at West Ham following a meeting with Daniel Křetínský in Prague.

As reported on @talkSPORT, Bowen took time post-relegation to consider his future, prioritising talks with West Ham to understand their vision.

Bowen has made an amendment to his contract, covering 2026/2027, as @RoshaneSport called. His West Ham deal still runs until 2030.⚒️

🗣️ Bowen: "The main motivation for me is staying and bringing this club back into the Premier League where we belong."
draft_caption:
📝 CONTRACT- JARROD BOWEN SIGNS A NEW DEAL AT WEST HAM.

#WHUFC #ContractNews #PremierLeague #FPL
